use_cases: Hero sections for landing pages requiring atmospheric visual depth
Application backgrounds providing visual interest without distracting from content
Dark-themed interfaces needing premium animated ambiance effects
Login screens and authentication pages seeking modern aesthetics
Marketing sites and product showcases wanting distinctive visual identity
ai_summary: An animated grid background component that renders a subtle grid pattern with floating, smoothly-interpolated glow orbs using HTML5 Canvas. The glows transition between grid positions with easing, creating a morphing ambient effect. Fully customizable via props for background color, grid size, grid color, glow colors, and glow count. Ideal for hero sections, landing pages, and dark-themed interfaces needing atmospheric visual depth.
